sentence: O ceo non está claro hoxe.
ipa: o θeo noŋ esta klaɾo oʃe
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ before a front vowel [θ] 'ceo' — the central block keeps /θ/ (no seseo); word-final ⟨n⟩ velarised [ŋ] 'non' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Estes zapatos custan corenta euros.
ipa: estes θapatos kustaŋ koɾenta ewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'zapatos' (distinción retained); coda ⟨n⟩ [ŋ] 'custan'; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi 'estes zapatos' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: A xuntanza é mañá ás tres.
ipa: a ʃuntanθa ɛ maɲa as tɾes
gloss_en: The gathering is tomorrow at three.
notes: Open-mid [ɛ] in the copula 'é' (7-vowel system) and palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'mañá'; historical ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xuntanza' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Meu irmán vive preto da vila.
ipa: mew iɾmaŋ bibe pɾeto da bila
gloss_en: My brother lives near the town.
notes: Word-final ⟨n⟩ velar [ŋ] 'irmán' and falling diphthong ⟨eu⟩ [ew] 'meu' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Vai de fronte e torce pola primeira rúa.
ipa: baj de fɾonte e toɾθe pola pɾimejɾa rua
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn down the first street.
notes: No Romance diphthongisation: 'fronte'/'torce' keep the mid vowel; word-initial trill [r] 'rúa' per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: A caldeirada daquel sitio estaba moi boa.
ipa: a kaldejɾaða dakel sitjo estaβa moj boa
gloss_en: The fish stew at that place was very good.
notes: Regional lexicon 'caldeirada'; the central block has no gheada, /ɡ/ staying [ɡ] with intervocalic lenition [ɣ]; hiatus resolved by sandhi per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Onde está a chave do coche?
ipa: onde esta a tʃabe do kotʃe
gloss_en: Where is the car key?
notes: Affricate ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chave'/'coche' (no deaffrication in the central norm); vowel hiatus 'está a' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Cantas persoas veñen cear?
ipa: kantas peɾsoas beɲeŋ θeaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'veñen' with a velarised coda [ŋ], and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cear' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Se eu puidese, mercaría aquela casa grande.
ipa: se ew pwiðese meɾkaɾia akela kasa ɡɾande
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that big house.
notes: Regional verb 'mercar' (to buy); vowel hiatus 'se eu' resolved across the junction per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Onte merquei cinco quilos de cereixas na praza.
ipa: onte meɾkej θinko kilos de θeɾejʃas na pɾaθa
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries in the square.
notes: Distinción ⟨c/z⟩ [θ] 'cinco'/'cereixas'/'praza' and ⟨ei⟩+⟨x⟩ [ejʃ] 'cereixas' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: O ano que vén hei viaxar a Lugo.
ipa: o ano ke bɛŋ ej bjaʃaɾ a luɣo
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Lugo.
notes: Open-mid [ɛ] under a velar coda 'vén' [bɛŋ]; ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'viaxar'; place-name Lugo with intervocalic [ɣ] per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Chámame cando chegues á casa.
ipa: tʃamame kando tʃeɡes a kasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Affricate ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chámame'/'chegues' and ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before a front vowel 'chegues' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Boas tardes, como che vai a vida?
ipa: boas taɾdes komo tʃe baj a biða
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how is life treating you?
notes: Clitic ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'che' (2sg dative); hiatus 'vai a' per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: Máis vale paxaro na man que cento voando.
ipa: mais bale paʃaɾo na maŋ ke θento boando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro' and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cento'; word-final velar [ŋ] 'man' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: O can corre pola ribeira do río.
ipa: o kaŋ kore pola riβejɾa do rio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Word-final velar [ŋ] 'can'; trill [r] in ⟨rr⟩ 'corre' and word-initial 'río' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribeira' per fernandez_rei1990.

sentence: A muller vella colle a agulla amarela.
ipa: a muʎeɾ beʎa koʎe a aɡʎa amaɾela
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'muller'/'vella'/'colle'/'agulla' — the central block resists yeísmo and keeps the lateral per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: O café da esquina é moi forte.
ipa: o kafɛ da eskina ɛ moj foɾte
gloss_en: The coffee from the corner is very strong.
notes: Two open-mid [ɛ] nuclei 'café'/'é' witnessing the 7-vowel contrast; hiatus 'esquina é' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: A viña da montaña dá bo viño.
ipa: a biɲa da montaɲa da bo biɲo
gloss_en: The vineyard on the mountain gives good wine.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'viña'/'montaña'/'viño'; apocope 'bo' (< bon) per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: Unha das mulleres colleu algunha flor.
ipa: uŋa das muʎeɾes koʎew alɡŋa floɾ
gloss_en: One of the women picked some flower.
notes: Velar nasal spelled ⟨nh⟩ [ŋ] 'unha'/'algunha' and palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] 'mulleres'/'colleu' per freixeiro_mato1998.

sentence: A praza da catedral ten doce columnas de pedra.
ipa: a pɾaθa da katedɾal teŋ doθe kolumnas de pedɾa
gloss_en: The cathedral square has twelve columns of stone.
notes: Distinción ⟨za⟩/⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'praza'/'doce' and word-final velar [ŋ] 'ten' per freixeiro_mato1998.
